agents.name: grimoire.frontend-architect
agents.description: Designs front-end application architecture — component hierarchies, state management strategy, module and feature boundaries, routing structure, API-layer contracts, and rendering strategy. Framework-agnostic core with dedicated Angular and Vue decision guidance; produces architecture-altitude designs, plans, and reviews that coder agents implement.

agents.name: grimoire.angular-coder
agents.description: Use this agent when the user needs Angular code written, fixed, refactored, or debugged. This agent implements components, services, directives, pipes, guards, resolvers, and any other Angular artifact. It reads the codebase to understand conventions, makes implementation decisions, and delivers working code.

agents.name: grimoire.vue3-coder
agents.description: Use this agent when working on any Vue 3 related task — scaffolding new components or pages, writing composables, building Pinia stores, setting up Vue Router, debugging template or reactivity issues, reviewing Vue code for best practices, migrating from Options API to Composition API, or optimizing Vue application performance.

agents.name: grimoire.angular-coder-guided
agents.description: Writes, fixes, refactors, and debugs Angular code — components, services, directives, pipes, guards, resolvers. Guided variant: treats explicit direction as binding — flags conflicts with best practice and recommends alternatives, but implements what was asked (refusing only genuinely harmful directions).

agents.name: grimoire.angular-coder-opinionated
agents.description: Writes, fixes, refactors, and debugs Angular code — components, services, directives, pipes, guards, resolvers. Opinionated variant: prioritizes engineering quality over instructions — implements the best-practice approach and documents every deviation with its rationale.

agents.name: grimoire.vue3-coder-guided
agents.description: Builds, refactors, and debugs Vue 3 applications — components, composables, Pinia stores, Vue Router, reactivity issues. Guided variant: treats explicit direction as binding — flags conflicts with best practice and recommends alternatives, but implements what was asked (refusing only genuinely harmful directions).

agents.name: grimoire.vue3-coder-opinionated
agents.description: Builds, refactors, and debugs Vue 3 applications — components, composables, Pinia stores, Vue Router, reactivity issues. Opinionated variant: prioritizes engineering quality over instructions — implements the best-practice approach and documents every deviation with its rationale.
